achievements.title: Nightvision
achievements.description: Find a pair of Nightvision Goggles.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Bang Bang
achievements.description: Use the handgun to reduce the remaining counter (Counter on the Left of Screen)
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: The Work Horse
achievements.description: Use the Shotgun to reduce the remaining counter (Counter on the Left of Screen)
achievements.author: Scott

achievements.title: Burn-in-nate
achievements.description: Use the Flamethrower to reduce the remaining counter (Counter on the Left of Screen)
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Triple Tap, One Pull
achievements.description: Use the Pulse Laser to reduce the remaining counter (Counter on the Left of Screen)
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Spot On
achievements.description: Use the Aimed Lasergun to reduce the remaining counter (Counter on the Left of Screen)
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Debateably Useful
achievements.description: Use the Rocket Launcher to reduce the remaining counter (Counter on the Left of Screen)
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Kung Fu Fighting
achievements.description: Using your bare hands (and Boots) reduce the remaining counter (Counter on the Left of Screen)
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Head Protection Needed
achievements.description: Find and kill 50 guards that are not wearing their helmets.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Armored Guards
achievements.description: Find and kill 50 guards that are wearing their helmets.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Mask On
achievements.description: Find and kill 50 Alien Invaders before they reveal themselves.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: The Blues
achievements.description: Find and damage blue rakes 100 times.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Property Damage
achievements.description: Destroy 25 Security Cameras from around the High Rise
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Docking Bay Level 1 Secured!
achievements.description: Wipe out all enemies on the Docking Bay Level 1.
achievements.author: Scott

achievements.title: Space Station Secured!
achievements.description: From start to finish completely secure the Space Station in one session.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Highrise Secured!
achievements.description: From The top floor to the Boss chamber, secure every floor of the Highrise in one session.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Completely Secure the Sub Basement!
achievements.description: From the top sub basement, the the bottom sub basement, secure the entire sub basement complex in one session.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Mission Efficiency
achievements.description: Save the Space Station, Clear the Highrise, and destroy the Alien in the Sub Basement in one session.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: A Marksman's Ability
achievements.description: Complete the game with Captain Ishii
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Demolition Man
achievements.description: Complete the game with Captain Haile
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Lone Wolf
achievements.description: Complete the game with Major Wolf
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: I Know Karate
achievements.description: Complete the game with Major Ramos
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: I Spy
achievements.description: Complete the game with Major Gjoerup
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: The Perfect Team
achievements.description: Every member of the team survived the mission.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Fully Loaded
achievements.description: Max out on ammo for handgun and shotgun before leaving the Dockbridge 1.
achievements.author: Scott

achievements.title: Boot to the Head
achievements.description: Attack and hit enemies with a jump kick 10 times while on the space station.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Handgun Master
achievements.description: On the Dock Bay Level 1, with Maj Wolf, kill all enemies without switching weapons.
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Pacifist
achievements.description: Reach the Docking Bay Level 2 without killing any enemies
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Untouchable
achievements.description: Wipe out all enemies on the Docking Bay Level 1 without losing any health, using only Captain Ishii
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Great Shots
achievements.description: Kill the Snipers instead of evading them.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Hit the Deck!
achievements.description: Escape the sniperse on the Roof Top. Take no damage and don't kill them.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Can I Pet Dat Dog?!
achievements.description: Find and kill an alien hound with an uppercut.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: The Unseen
achievements.description: Navigate from the Rooftop to floor 151 of the highrise without a camera alert triggering.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Go For The Head!
achievements.description: Jump kick the final boss in the game.
achievements.author: Wulden
